modules.name: worker-core
modules.description: Cloudflare Workers entry point — Hono router, rate limiting, request handling, metrics

modules.name: worker-routes
modules.description: API route handlers — OpenAPI endpoints for check-image, alerts, health, telegram, upload

modules.name: worker-admin
modules.description: Admin panel — server-rendered HTML for campaigns, analytics, activity monitoring

modules.name: worker-middleware
modules.description: Hono middleware — rate limiting, request ID, response headers

modules.name: worker-lib
modules.description: Shared utilities — rate limiter, request ID generator, response helpers

modules.name: worker-templates
modules.description: HTML-over-the-wire templates — blog pages, admin views (server-rendered)

modules.name: worker-data
modules.description: Data layer — content data, D1 database schemas, seed data

modules.name: ui-frontend
modules.description: React SPA frontend — landing page components (Hero, Header, Footer, HowItWorks)

modules.name: static-assets
modules.description: Static assets served via Workers asset binding

modules.name: e2e-tests
modules.description: End-to-end tests — Playwright specs, story runner, story parser

modules.name: scripts-tooling
modules.description: Build and ops tooling — seed content, merkle hashing, ADR indexer, RLM core

modules.name: infra
modules.description: Pulumi IaC — Cloudflare Workers, D1, R2, KV, DNS infrastructure definitions

execution_flows.name: http-request-handling
steps: Hono router receives HTTP request via fetch handler
Rate limiter middleware checks request against limits
Request ID middleware assigns tracking ID
Handler processes request and returns response
Response headers middleware applies security/CORS headers

execution_flows.name: telegram-webhook
steps: Response sent back to Telegram API

execution_flows.name: rlm-repl-session
steps: System message built for Romanian context

discovered_dimensions.name: Observability Stack Integration
discovered_dimensions.description: Measures whether an observability MCP is configured and actively used for runtime insight
discovered_dimensions.rationale: No observability MCP (Sentry, Datadog, etc.) installed — agents lack runtime performance context

discovered_dimensions.name: Error Handling Consistency
discovered_dimensions.description: Fraction of source files with async operations that also have explicit error handling
discovered_dimensions.rationale: 90/214 files with async ops have error handling — inconsistent coverage risks silent failures

discovered_dimensions.name: Database Migration Discipline
discovered_dimensions.description: Verifies migrations are sequential and include rollback scripts
discovered_dimensions.rationale: 7 migration files found, 0 have rollback definitions — blocks safe production reverts

discovered_dimensions.name: Authentication Layer Completeness
discovered_dimensions.description: Measures whether auth is implemented as consistent middleware, not scattered checks
discovered_dimensions.rationale: 33 middleware/guard definitions detected — need to verify coverage across all routes

discovered_dimensions.name: Modularity Index
discovered_dimensions.description: Balance between DI patterns and global state usage
discovered_dimensions.rationale: Low DI pattern adoption (1/300 files) — tight coupling may resist testing and parallel dev
